subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the most luminous vision! Every soul in the realm of existence hath an orientation and a purpose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظهر بمنظر انور هر نفسی را درعالم وجود توجهی و مقصودی
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @meditation
